allow: Bash(node -e "const { BrevoClient } = require\('@getbrevo/brevo'\); const c = new BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'test' }\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { BrevoClient } = require\('@getbrevo/brevo'\); const c = new BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'test' }\); const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c\)\); console.log\(proto\)")
